name: Vegetable Stir Fry
instructions: Chop all vegetables. Heat oil in a pan, saute garlic and ginger. Add vegetables and stir fry on high heat for 5-7 minutes. Add soy sauce and toss well. Serve hot.

name: Tomato Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta until al dente. In a pan, saute garlic and onion in olive oil, add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add basil and salt. Mix in pasta and serve.

name: Egg Fried Rice
instructions: Scramble eggs and set aside. Saute garlic and onion, add carrot and peas. Add cooked rice, soy sauce, and scrambled eggs. Mix well and serve.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
instructions: Saute onion, garlic and ginger in butter. Add tomato puree and cook until oil separates. Add garam masala, cream, and paneer cubes. Simmer for 5 minutes and serve.

name: Chicken Curry
instructions: Saute onions until golden, add garlic-ginger paste, tomatoes, and spices. Add chicken pieces and cook covered until tender. Serve with rice or roti.

name: Greek Salad
instructions: Chop cucumber, tomato, and onion. Combine with olives and feta cheese. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle oregano. Toss gently and serve chilled.

name: Mushroom Soup
instructions: Saute mushrooms, onion and garlic in butter. Add vegetable stock and simmer for 10 minutes. Blend until smooth, stir in cream and black pepper.

name: Bean Tacos
instructions: Cook black beans with onion and chili powder. Fill tortillas with the bean mixture, top with tomato, lettuce, and cheese. Squeeze lime and serve.

name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich
instructions: Grill chicken breast with black pepper. Toast bread slices, layer with lettuce, tomato, cheese, and grilled chicken. Add mayonnaise and serve.

name: Vegetable Fried Noodles
instructions: Boil noodles and set aside. Saute garlic, then add shredded vegetables and stir fry. Add noodles and soy sauce, toss well, garnish with spring onion.

name: Masala Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs with chopped onion, tomato, green chili, coriander, and salt. Pour onto a hot greased pan and cook both sides until golden.

name: Fruit Salad
instructions: Chop all fruits into bite-sized pieces. Mix in a bowl with honey and lemon juice. Chill for 10 minutes before serving.

name: Spinach Dal
instructions: Cook lentils until soft. Saute cumin, garlic, and onion, add tomato and spinach. Combine with cooked lentils and simmer for 10 minutes.

name: Margherita Pizza
instructions: Spread tomato sauce on pizza base, top with mozzarella cheese and basil leaves. Drizzle olive oil and bake at 220C for 12-15 minutes.

name: Shrimp Stir Fry
instructions: Saute garlic and ginger, add shrimp and cook until pink. Add bell pepper, onion, soy sauce, and chili. Stir fry for 5 minutes and serve.
